untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic position sizing proportional to deviation magnitude from mean, and unknown lookback_period for mean calculation. The deviation-based scaling logic cannot be expressed in the 3-field condition format. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no parameters provided for threshold definition or calculation method.
translation_notes: Used sma_20 as a proxy for the mean price level. Entry/exit conditions implement basic mean-reversion logic (buy below mean, sell above mean) using price crossing sma_20. However, the core requirement of position sizing scaled to deviation magnitude cannot be implemented in this rule structure—this would require custom position sizing logic outside the condition-based framework. Lookback period, half-life, and exact threshold definition are all AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be determined.
